remarks: Rare waterfront opportunity in Rowayton's premier Farm Creek location! This beautifully updated 3/4BR/3BA home delivers unobstructed, year-round water views and seamless coastal living. The gourmet chef's kitchen boasts a 6-burner Viking range, Thermador fridge, Miele dishwasher, wine cooler, walk-in pantry, and an eat-in area opening directly to a scenic stone patio. A spacious family room also offers patio access, perfect for indoor-outdoor entertaining. The luxurious primary suite features a private viewing balcony, walk-in closet, and radiant-heated ensuite bath. High-tech and efficiency upgrades include a new propane boiler, 220V EV charging outlet in the detached 2-car garage (with additional overhead storage), upgraded internet, alarm systems, and a smart lock. Steps from Bayley Beach and Rowayton village. Offered unfurnished for a 1-year lease. Tenant pays utilities. No smoking.
